_publications._publicationTitle: Pilot study of the effectiveness of a telehealth group for improving peer relationships for adolescents with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Group-level improvements in caregiver-reported social-emotional skills, social impairment, caregiver-reported number of adolescent get-togethers, and adolescent's social knowledge at post-test and follow-up were found
details: Group-level improvements in caregiver-reported social-emotional skills, social impairment, caregiver-reported number of adolescents get-togethers, and adolescent's social knowledge at post-test and at follow-up with medium to large effect sizes
